name: STM32F072 LQFP48/UFQFPN48
description: Generated from the STM32F072 alternate-function workbook and STM32F072C8 datasheet for STM32F072 LQFP48/UFQFPN48. This definition models the LQFP48/UFQFPN48 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32F072 devices push STM32F0 connectivity further with USB-capable mid-range packages and a wider peripheral routing matrix. This package definition exposes 27 peripheral blocks covering 7 timers, 4 serial ports, 2 SPI controllers, 2 I2S interfaces, 2 I2C controllers, 1 ADC instance, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, and 1 USB interface.

peripherals.label: ADC1
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 10 analog input channels.

peripherals.label: CEC
peripherals.description: HDMI-CEC single-wire interface.

peripherals.label: COMP1
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input and a comparator output.

peripherals.label: COMP2
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input and a comparator output.

peripherals.label: CRS
peripherals.description: CRS peripheral with 1 configurable signal.

peripherals.label: I2C1
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL, SDA, and SMBA signals.

peripherals.label: I2C2
peripherals.description: I2C bus controller with SCL and SDA signals.

peripherals.label: I2S1
peripherals.description: I2S digital audio interface with MCK, CK, WS, and SD signals.

peripherals.label: I2S2
peripherals.description: I2S digital audio interface with MCK, CK, WS, and SD signals.

peripherals.label: IRTIM
peripherals.description: Infrared interface timer output signal.

peripherals.description: Low-speed 32.768 kHz oscillator interface with input and output pins.

peripherals.description: Real-time clock interface with OUT, TAMP1, and TAMP2 signals.

peripherals.label: SPI1
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: SPI2
peripherals.description: SPI controller with NSS, SCK, MISO, and MOSI signals.

peripherals.label: TIM1
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, CH2, CH3, and CH4, complementary outputs, a break input, and an external trigger input.

peripherals.label: TIM15

peripherals.label: TIM16
peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, complementary outputs, and a break input.

peripherals.description: Advanced-control timer with capture/compare channels CH1, complementary outputs, and a break input.

peripherals.description: General-purpose timer with capture/compare channels CH2, CH3, and CH4.
